title: Coursera India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Coursera India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Coursera India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Coursera India:
Coursera India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India!
